name: Chocolate Chip Streusel Coffeecake
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces cream cheese or neufchatel cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the brown sugar and flour; cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs. Stir in walnuts and chocolate pieces.
2. In another bowl, beat together the softened cream cheese, granulated sugar, and butter until well blended on medium speed of an electric mixer. Blend in the eggs and vanilla.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the cream cheese mixture, alternating with milk, mixing well after each addition. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan. Sprinkle with crumb topping.
5. Bake in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 50 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean. Cool.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
